TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Sakizaya Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://szy.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_szy, title = {Sakizaya Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://szy.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: Wuweitailang („ĀĒ„ĀŅ „Āü„āć„ĀÜ,1945 mihcaan wulay a bulad izaw ku tusay a bataan a demiad) u Tibuen mikulitay a tademaw. kakiliman Wuweitailang 1945 mihcaan lecuhan i Tungcin dudiaobu shi.mamin micudad tu talawkaway a nipicudad atu mipikingiu tu kawaw,mamen sa tu kakawaw i misangaay a kawaw ci nida. 1973 a mihcaan izaw ku sayaway a nipisanga' tu taayaway a "dadan" , sisa u sikulitay a cudad ku sasangan a kawaw nida tu nu dadan. ayda han tu sikulitay a cudad sepat a lasubut ku nisasangan nida.caay kasikulitay a cudad idaw ku nipisulit tu dadadiwan, sisa idaw ku sulit nu aadihan apabelu. Wuweitailang i Tibuen sakanamuhan nida miadih tu mimaliyay. nilacul
S.PHON: wuw…ôitair~…ĺaŇč (** ***,**** mińß ¶aan wur~…ĺaj a bur~…ĺad izaw ku tusaj a bataan a d…ômiad) u tibu…ôn mikur~…ĺitaj a tad…ômaw. kakir~…ĺiman wuw…ôitair~…ĺaŇč **** mińß ¶aan r~…ĺ…ô ¶uńßan i tuŇč ¶in dudiaobu sńßi.mamin mi ¶udad tu tar~…ĺawkawaj a nipi ¶udad atu mipikiŇčiu tu kawaw,mam…ôn sa tu kakawaw i misaŇčaaj a kawaw ¶i nida. **** a mińß ¶aan izaw ku sajawaj a nipisaŇča Ē~ ° tu taajawaj a "dadan" , sisa u sikur~…ĺitaj a ¶udad ku sasaŇčan a kawaw nida tu nu dadan. ajda ńßan tu sikur~…ĺitaj a ¶udad s…ôpat a r~…ĺasubut ku nisasaŇčan nida. ¶aaj kasikur~…ĺitaj a ¶udad idaw ku nipisur~…ĺit tu dadadiwan, sisa idaw ku sur~…ĺit nu aadińßan apab…ôr~…ĺu. wuw…ôitair~…ĺaŇč i tibu…ôn sakanamuńßan nida miadińß tu mimar~…ĺijaj. nir~…ĺa ¶ur~…ĺ
S.FORM: Wuweitailang („ĀĒ„ĀŅ „Āü„āć„ĀÜ,1945 mihcaan wulay a bulad izaw ku tusay a bataan a demiad) u Tibuen mikulitay a tademaw. kakiliman Wuweitailang 1945 mihcaan lecuhan i Tungcin dudiaobu shi.mamin micudad tu talawkaway a nipicudad atu mipikingiu tu kawaw,mamen sa tu kakawaw i misangaay a kawaw ci nida. 1973 a mihcaan izaw ku sayaway a nipisanga' tu taayaway a "dadan" , sisa u sikulitay a cudad ku sasangan a kawaw nida tu nu dadan. ayda han tu sikulitay a cudad sepat a lasubut ku nisasangan nida.caay kasikulitay a cudad idaw ku nipisulit tu dadadiwan, sisa idaw ku sulit nu aadihan apabelu. Wuweitailang i Tibuen sakanamuhan nida miadih tu mimaliyay. nilacul
S.PHON: wuw…ôitair~…ĺaŇč (** ***,**** mińß ¶aan wur~…ĺaj a bur~…ĺad izaw ku tusaj a bataan a d…ômiad) u tibu…ôn mikur~…ĺitaj a tad…ômaw. kakir~…ĺiman wuw…ôitair~…ĺaŇč **** mińß ¶aan r~…ĺ…ô ¶uńßan i tuŇč ¶in dudiaobu sńßi.mamin mi ¶udad tu tar~…ĺawkawaj a nipi ¶udad atu mipikiŇčiu tu kawaw,mam…ôn sa tu kakawaw i misaŇčaaj a kawaw ¶i nida. **** a mińß ¶aan izaw ku sajawaj a nipisaŇča Ē~ ° tu taajawaj a "dadan" , sisa u sikur~…ĺitaj a ¶udad ku sasaŇčan a kawaw nida tu nu dadan. ajda ńßan tu sikur~…ĺitaj a ¶udad s…ôpat a r~…ĺasubut ku nisasaŇčan nida. ¶aaj kasikur~…ĺitaj a ¶udad idaw ku nipisur~…ĺit tu dadadiwan, sisa idaw ku sur~…ĺit nu aadińßan apab…ôr~…ĺu. wuw…ôitair~…ĺaŇč i tibu…ôn sakanamuńßan nida miadińß tu mimar~…ĺijaj. nir~…ĺa ¶ur~…ĺ
